summary: Iteration 24 - Batch 2 Testing Complete: Barcode Scanner + UI Fixes. All features verified working. BarcodeScanner component using html5-qrcode integrated in both DriverDashboard and AdminDashboard. Footer no longer overlaps login/register forms (position: static instead of fixed). All pricing displays correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: BarcodeScanner.jsx correctly uses html5-qrcode library with proper error handling for camera unavailability
DriverDashboard.jsx has showScanner state and BarcodeScanner modal integration at lines 33, 262-282
AdminDashboard.jsx has showScanner state and BarcodeScanner integration at lines 72, 241-252, 475-480
Footer.jsx uses relative positioning (no position:fixed) with proper 3-column grid layout
AuthPages.jsx uses flex-col layout with flex-1 for content area, footer at bottom without overlap
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 verified Batch 2 features: 1) BarcodeScanner component using html5-qrcode (v2.3.8) integrated in both DriverDashboard ('Scanner un colis' button) and AdminDashboard ('Scan Code-barre' quick action). Scanner shows camera error state in headless/test environment as expected. 2) Footer no longer overlaps login/register forms - changed from position:fixed to relative, pages use flex-col layout. 3) Footer redesigned with #0f172a background, 3-column grid (Brand, Légal, Offres sections). 4) Pricing correctly shows Solo 19€, Croissance 189€, Flotte Pro 489€ on landing page and footer.
